docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,225.00 FILED BY GUEVARA, ETHELJIVE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAGATA, VINCENT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAGATA, VINCENT J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, ETHELJIVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDAGATA, VINCENT J. $3,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,260.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAGATA, VINCENT J.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,228.15 AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAGATA, VINCENT J.
